brand.name: HomeSavior
brand.tagline: Professional dehumidification after water damage — Málaga and Costa del Sol

hero.title: Get your space back with industrial dehumidification
hero.subtitle: Fast response in Málaga city and Costa del Sol. Moisture monitoring, water removal, and controlled drying to prevent mould and structural damage.
hero.imageAlt: Industrial HVAC and drying equipment on site

problem.heading: The problem is not only what you can see
problem.intro: After a leak, burst pipe, or heavy rain, moisture hides in walls, floors, and voids. Without measured drying, odours, mould, and structural risks follow.
problem.point1: Residual moisture keeps moving even when surfaces look dry.
problem.point2: Mould and condensation often appear late, after damage has stacked up.
problem.point3: On the coast, salt air and climate can extend drying time without the right equipment.

solution.heading: The solution: professional, measurable drying
solution.intro: We combine two complementary tracks: stop damage early, then dry with technical control until readings stabilise.
solution.cardEmergencyBody: Extraction and containment to cut moisture pathways and protect joinery, insulation, and finishes.
solution.cardDryingBody: High‑performance equipment, airflow planning, and moisture logging for accountable drying.
solution.imageEmergencyAlt: Water intrusion and moisture control on site
solution.imageDryingAlt: Technician checking installations after a leak

process.heading: How we work
process.intro: A clear path from first contact to equipment removal.
process.step1Body: We capture context, urgency, and risks (power, active leaks).
process.step2Body: We assess critical areas and define kit, timelines, and humidity targets.
process.step3Body: We install equipment, isolate zones, and baseline the readings.
process.step4Body: We adjust the programme using live data to protect materials.
process.step5Body: We review progress, strike kit, and clarify next steps.

whyUs.heading: Why work with us
whyUs.point1Body: We know typical buildings in the province and coastal humidity challenges.
whyUs.point2Body: Decisions grounded in moisture data, not guesses from looks alone.
whyUs.point3Body: A single point of contact from survey through equipment removal.

contact.heading: Tell us what happened
contact.intro: Share your details and we will outline next steps (no obligation). We reply on business days.
contact.bullet1: No spam — only follow‑up for this request.
contact.bullet2: If it is urgent, note electrical risk or active leaks.
contact.channelsIntro: You can also reach us on:

contactForm.name: Full name
contactForm.city: City or area (e.g. Málaga centro, Torremolinos)

footer.line2: This site does not replace reading contract terms or expert reports.

whatsappPrefill: Hello — I would like guidance on dehumidification in Málaga.
successMessage: Thank you — we have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.

serviceEmergency.title: Emergency response: extraction and containment
serviceEmergency.intro: We prioritise cutting the moisture source and isolating critical areas to limit damage to joinery and insulation before it spreads.
serviceEmergency.point1Body: We reduce free water and stabilise the workspace safely.
serviceEmergency.point2Body: We isolate rooms or runs to focus drying and shield finishes.
serviceEmergency.point3Body: We clarify what to watch for and when industrial dehumidification may be needed.
serviceEmergency.ctaTitle: Dealing with an active or recent leak?
serviceEmergency.ctaBody: Message us and we will guide you on response steps and equipment.

serviceDrying.title: Industrial dehumidification and monitoring
serviceDrying.intro: We pair high‑capacity machines with careful airflow so structures dry without overheating materials.
serviceDrying.point1Body: Sized for volume and typical coastal construction.
serviceDrying.point2Body: Dew point and RH logs to evidence drying progress.
serviceDrying.point3Body: We adjust timing on readings, not only on a fixed schedule.
serviceDrying.ctaBody: Ask for guidance and we will propose the right programme and follow‑up.
